app_info.subtitle: Save and retrieve memory
app_info.description: Personal Agent Memory helps users retrieve relevant durable context, save useful session knowledge, browse stored memories, and maintain the private memory vault.

justifications.read_only_justification: Retrieves context for a topic but can initialize missing private vault folders and files.
justifications.open_world_justification: Operates on the authenticated user's private vault and does not publish or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Analyzes a session record and can create, update, deactivate, and index private memory records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Changes are limited to the authenticated user's private vault and are not published publicly.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can overwrite existing memory content or deactivate a memory record when organizing a session.

justifications.read_only_justification: Regenerates derived indexes and updates private memory metadata.
justifications.open_world_justification: Updates remain within the authenticated user's private vault and do not create public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Overwrites derived index files and may overwrite metadata fields while rebuilding them.

justifications.read_only_justification: Creates missing private vault folders and an activity log when initialization is needed.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only creates private local vault structure and does not publish or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete or overwrite existing vault content.

justifications.read_only_justification: Lists private memory metadata but can initialize missing vault folders and files first.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only accesses the authenticated user's private vault and does not publish or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Reads a private memory by slug but can initialize missing vault folders and files first.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only accesses the authenticated user's private vault and does not publish or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Initialize a new private memory vault.
test_cases.user_prompt: Set up my memory vault so it is ready to use.
test_cases.expected_output: Confirms that the private vault structure is available.

test_cases.description: Retrieve context for an explicit work topic.
test_cases.user_prompt: What durable context do I have about the remote MCP service?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns compact relevant memory packets, advisory guidance, and any applicable continuation brief.

test_cases.description: Persist durable memory from an explicit session record.
test_cases.user_prompt: Organize and save this session record: we decided to use managed OAuth and need to verify authentication next.
test_cases.expected_output: Persists and reports the durable memory changes extracted from the session record.

test_cases.description: Browse the available durable memories in stable order.
test_cases.user_prompt: List the memories in my vault, starting with the first page.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a page of memory metadata and a continuation cursor only when more results are available.

test_cases.description: Read a selected memory in full.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the selected memory's Markdown and safe metadata, or a clear error when it does not exist.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke the app for unrelated calendar requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because calendar scheduling is outside its supported workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke the app to search the public web.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Find the latest public news about Cloudflare.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only manages private memory context.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not invoke the app for unrelated content generation.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Write a poem about Amsterdam canals.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because creative writing alone does not require memory retrieval or management.
